title: Design System: Antigravity Custom Model Enabler UI

shadows.name: banner-lift
shadows.purpose: Persistent error banner above chat input.

components.name: Provider Manager Modal
components.description: 650px two-step modal to add external models; step indicator, fetch, select, save.
components.css: .agy-modal { background:#18181b; border:1px solid #3f3f46; border-radius:12px; width:650px; max-height:85vh; color:#f4f4f5; font-family:-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,'Segoe UI',Roboto,sans-serif; box-shadow:0 20px 25px -5px rgba(0,0,0,0.5); } .agy-modal-header { padding:16px 24px; border-bottom:1px solid #3f3f46; display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center; } .agy-close { background:none; border:none; color:#a1a1aa; font-size:24px; cursor:pointer; }

components.name: Model Row Card
components.description: A custom model entry with provider icon, status dot, test + delete actions.
components.html:
Model
openaiurl
components.css: .agy-model-row { display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center; padding:12px 16px; background:#18181b; border:1px solid #27272a; border-radius:8px; transition:border-color 0.15s ease, background-color 0.15s ease; } .agy-model-row:hover { border-color:#3f3f46; background:#1c1c1f; } .agy-dot { width:6px; height:6px; border-radius:50%; background:#71717a; } .agy-badge { font-size:10px; font-weight:600; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.5px; padding:2px 6px; border-radius:4px; background:#a855f722; color:#a855f7; }

components.name: Error Toast
components.description: Top-right contextual toast with accent left rule, title, message, suggestions.
components.css: .agy-toast { background:#18181b; border:1px solid #27272a; border-radius:12px; padding:16px 20px; color:#f4f4f5; box-shadow:0 10px 15px -3px rgba(0,0,0,0.5),0 4px 6px -2px rgba(0,0,0,0.5); position:relative; overflow:hidden; } .agy-accent { position:absolute; left:0; top:0; bottom:0; width:4px; background:#a855f7; }

narrative.overview: The injected Custom Models UI is a calm, native-feeling control surface that disappears into the Antigravity IDE chrome. Restrained dark zinc, system typography, and provider-colored accents used sparingly. Every state is built to reassure: the user always knows what the system is doing and what to do next. It rejects loud AI-wrapper dashboards, neon gradients, and any visual language that clashes with the dark IDE shell.
keyCharacteristics: Dark tonal surfaces matching the host IDE
System font stack; hierarchy via weight/size only
Provider accents only as small icon bubbles, badges, status dots
Constant but quiet feedback (status dots, toasts)

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Accent blue fills ≤10% of any surface; provider colors appear only as 16–32px bubbles, 10px badges, or 6px dots.

rules.name: The Invisible Type Rule
rules.body: Never introduce a non-system font; hierarchy comes from weight (500/600) and size (10/13/14/18px).

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Inline panels and cards are flat (border + tonal fill). Shadows reserved for overlays floating above the IDE.

dos: Match the IDE's dark zinc surfaces for any new panel or modal.
Use provider accents only as small icon bubbles, badges, or status dots.
Keep body text at #f4f4f5 / #a1a1aa to hold ≥4.5:1 contrast.
Show a quiet status dot so the user always knows connection state.
Clone the IDE's own button classes for entry points.
donts: Use cream, sand, beige, or warm-neutral body backgrounds.
Introduce gradient-heavy, neon, or glassmorphism visuals.
Build loud AI-wrapper dashboards with playful mascots.
Fill large areas with provider brand colors.
Write error states that blame the user.
